# SarvamSai — A Centenary Offering

> A devotional, net-zero collectible Discovery Box honouring the 100th birth anniversary of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba (1926–2026).

## What is SarvamSai?

SarvamSai is a limited edition collectible offering created by AuRaaZ Technologies. It comprises a sealed Discovery Box containing a hand-finished, 3D-printed PLA figurine of one of four Swaroopas of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba. The offering is made at net-zero profit — all proceeds cover production costs, and any surplus forms the Sarvam Sai Universe transmedia fund.

## The Offering

- 100 Discovery Boxes released daily for 100 days
- Blessing window: 24 April 2026 – 1 August 2026
- Total edition: 10,000 boxes
- Each box is time-stamped with its blessing date and numbered
- The Swaroopa inside is not revealed until the devotee opens the box

## The Four Swaroopas

Each box contains one of four figurine variants, distributed in a sacred ratio of 4:3:2:1 per 10 boxes:

1. **Satya Swaroopa** (Saffron Robe) — Embodiment of Truth. 4 in every 10. Most Abundant.
2. **Dharma Swaroopa** (Golden Robe) — Embodiment of Righteousness. 3 in every 10. Abundant.
3. **Shanti Swaroopa** (White Robe) — Embodiment of Peace. 2 in every 10. Rare.
4. **Prema Swaroopa** (Crimson Robe) — Embodiment of Love. 1 in every 10. Rarest.

## The Three Phases

- **Phase I**: 10 cm figurine · 5×5×15 cm box · 100 per day · 100 days · Apr 24 – Aug 1, 2026
- **Phase II**: 15 cm figurine · 7.5×7.5×20 cm box · 100 per day · 100 days · Unlocked by Phase I
- **Phase III**: 30 cm figurine · 15×15×36 cm box · 10 pieces only · November 23, 2026 (Baba's Centenary Birthday)

## The Net-Zero Model

All proceeds cover: production (PLA, 3D printing, hand-finishing), packaging, shipping, and platform costs. Any surplus is pooled into the Sarvam Sai Universe transmedia fund — supporting Phase II and Phase III figurines and simple transmedia experiences (audio, visual, web) tied to each Swaroopa.

## About Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Born November 23, 1926 in Puttaparthi, Andhra Pradesh, India. Spiritual leader and humanitarian who taught five Human Values: Satya (Truth), Dharma (Righteousness), Shanti (Peace), Prema (Love), Ahimsa (Non-violence). He is considered by devotees to be Ananta — without beginning, without end. November 23, 2026 marks 100 years since His birth.

## The Team

- **Kamayya Gupta Vinnakota** — Creative Technologist, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies. Blessed by Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba (Aksharabhyasam). 25+ years in CG, digital creation and technology.
- **Satyadev Vasigala** — Content & Concepts, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies.
- **Anish Mohan** — CG Supervisor & Artisan. Creator of the SarvamSai figurines.
